markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review Q3 performance and align on future content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/1-LzBPatwj2bPN4YM-SjyyUJzbSPJjh6?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Q3 Growth Despite Headwinds:** Achieved 26% QoQ non-branded click growth and 41% impression growth, outperforming competitors like Gong (down 50%) amid major SERP volatility.](https://fathom.video/share/1-LzBPatwj2bPN4YM-SjyyUJzbSPJjh6?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [**Refreshes Drive Performance:** Strategic refreshes of high-potential pages (e.g., "Sales Email Templates") were the primary driver of click growth, proving the strategy's effectiveness.](https://fathom.video/share/1-LzBPatwj2bPN4YM-SjyyUJzbSPJjh6?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
  - [**LLM Engagement Up:** While LLM sessions declined industry-wide, Outreach's engagement rate rose, signaling higher content quality and better query matching.](https://fathom.video/share/1-LzBPatwj2bPN4YM-SjyyUJzbSPJjh6?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [**Future Strategy:** Focus on expanding refreshes to high-impression/low-click articles, building topic clusters, and owning the "AI for Sales" category.](https://fathom.video/share/1-LzBPatwj2bPN4YM-SjyyUJzbSPJjh6?tab=summary&timestamp=1398.0)

## Topics

### Q3 Performance & Market Context

  - [**Market Headwinds:** Performance was achieved against significant SERP volatility:](https://fathom.video/share/1-LzBPatwj2bPN4YM-SjyyUJzbSPJjh6?tab=summary&timestamp=717.0)
      - [**August Spam Update:** Caused prolonged ranking turbulence.](https://fathom.video/share/1-LzBPatwj2bPN4YM-SjyyUJzbSPJjh6?tab=summary&timestamp=717.0)
      - [**Google's "10 results per page" change:** Made ranking on page 1 critical for visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/1-LzBPatwj2bPN4YM-SjyyUJzbSPJjh6?tab=summary&timestamp=717.0)
      - [**October Ranking Turbulence:** Widespread, unconfirmed algorithm shifts.](https://fathom.video/share/1-LzBPatwj2bPN4YM-SjyyUJzbSPJjh6?tab=summary&timestamp=717.0)
  - [**Outreach Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/1-LzBPatwj2bPN4YM-SjyyUJzbSPJjh6?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
      - [**Non-Branded Clicks:** +26% QoQ.](https://fathom.video/share/1-LzBPatwj2bPN4YM-SjyyUJzbSPJjh6?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
      - [**Impressions:** +41% QoQ.](https://fathom.video/share/1-LzBPatwj2bPN4YM-SjyyUJzbSPJjh6?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
      - [**Competitor Performance:** Gong's organic traffic fell 50% during the same period.](https://fathom.video/share/1-LzBPatwj2bPN4YM-SjyyUJzbSPJjh6?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)
  - [**Top-Performing Refreshes:**](https://fathom.video/share/1-LzBPatwj2bPN4YM-SjyyUJzbSPJjh6?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
      - [Sales Email Templates](https://fathom.video/share/1-LzBPatwj2bPN4YM-SjyyUJzbSPJjh6?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
      - [AI Lead Generation](https://fathom.video/share/1-LzBPatwj2bPN4YM-SjyyUJzbSPJjh6?tab=summary&timestamp=605.0)
      - [Sales Forecasting Methods](https://fathom.video/share/1-LzBPatwj2bPN4YM-SjyyUJzbSPJjh6?tab=summary&timestamp=605.0)
      - [Sales Coaching](https://fathom.video/share/1-LzBPatwj2bPN4YM-SjyyUJzbSPJjh6?tab=summary&timestamp=605.0)
      - [Mutual Action Plans](https://fathom.video/share/1-LzBPatwj2bPN4YM-SjyyUJzbSPJjh6?tab=summary&timestamp=605.0)
  - [**LLM Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/1-LzBPatwj2bPN4YM-SjyyUJzbSPJjh6?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
      - [**Sessions:** Down QoQ (industry-wide trend).](https://fathom.video/share/1-LzBPatwj2bPN4YM-SjyyUJzbSPJjh6?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
      - [**Engagement Rate:** Up QoQ, signaling higher content quality.](https://fathom.video/share/1-LzBPatwj2bPN4YM-SjyyUJzbSPJjh6?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
      - [**New Content:** Q3 articles are already earning LLM sessions, a positive early signal.](https://fathom.video/share/1-LzBPatwj2bPN4YM-SjyyUJzbSPJjh6?tab=summary&timestamp=1042.0)

### Future Strategy & Content Process

  - [**Strategic Focus:**](https://fathom.video/share/1-LzBPatwj2bPN4YM-SjyyUJzbSPJjh6?tab=summary&timestamp=1398.0)
      - [**Refreshes:** Expand to high-impression, low-click articles.](https://fathom.video/share/1-LzBPatwj2bPN4YM-SjyyUJzbSPJjh6?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
      - [**Topic Clusters:** Build around winning categories (AI, forecasting) with pillar pages.](https://fathom.video/share/1-LzBPatwj2bPN4YM-SjyyUJzbSPJjh6?tab=summary&timestamp=1485.0)
      - [**Internal Linking:** Connect new content to top-performing pages.](https://fathom.video/share/1-LzBPatwj2bPN4YM-SjyyUJzbSPJjh6?tab=summary&timestamp=1398.0)
      - [**LLM Optimization:** Structure content for easy AI parsing.](https://fathom.video/share/1-LzBPatwj2bPN4YM-SjyyUJzbSPJjh6?tab=summary&timestamp=1286.0)
  - [**Content Process Improvement:**](https://fathom.video/share/1-LzBPatwj2bPN4YM-SjyyUJzbSPJjh6?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
      - [**Problem:** Tool review listicles require review from the PMM team, causing delays.](https://fathom.video/share/1-LzBPatwj2bPN4YM-SjyyUJzbSPJjh6?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
      - [**Solution:** For future listicles, GrowthX will provide topics and tool outlines \~2 weeks in advance to allow for a longer review cycle.](https://fathom.video/share/1-LzBPatwj2bPN4YM-SjyyUJzbSPJjh6?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:** Provide "Best AI Topics" listicle topic and tool outline \~2 weeks in advance.](https://fathom.video/share/1-LzBPatwj2bPN4YM-SjyyUJzbSPJjh6?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
  - [**Outreach:** Review the full Q3 report and share any lead/conversion data.](https://fathom.video/share/1-LzBPatwj2bPN4YM-SjyyUJzbSPJjh6?tab=summary&timestamp=1602.0)
  - [**Hadassah:** Invite Paul (Visual Marketing Director) to the next meeting to discuss landing page strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/1-LzBPatwj2bPN4YM-SjyyUJzbSPJjh6?tab=summary&timestamp=1966.0)
  - [**Jenn:** Research the impact of Perplexity's new sponsored features.](https://fathom.video/share/1-LzBPatwj2bPN4YM-SjyyUJzbSPJjh6?tab=summary&timestamp=1719.0)
